samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Design a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz into 50MHz, 10MHz, and 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">Reset signal.</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="counter_50">
            <description>Counter to divide the input clock signal by 2 to generate CLK_50.</description>
            <input_signals>
                <input_signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input_signal>
                <input_signal id="RST">Reset signal.</input_signal>
            </input_signals>
            <output_signals>
                <output_signal id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output_signal>
            </output_signals>
            <implementation>
                <assign id="CLK_50">~CLK_in</assign>
            </implementation>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="counter_10">
            <description>Counter to divide the input clock signal by 10 to generate CLK_10.</description>
            <input_signals>
                <input_signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input_signal>
                <input_signal id="RST">Reset signal.</input_signal>
            </input_signals>
            <output_signals>
                <output_signal id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output_signal>
            </output_signals>
            <implementation>
                <assign id="CLK_10">~CLK_10</assign>
            </implementation>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="counter_1">
            <description>Counter to divide the input clock signal by 100 to generate CLK_1.</description>
            <input_signals>
                <input_signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input_signal>
                <input_signal id="RST">Reset signal.</input_signal>
            </input_signals>
            <output_signals>
                <output_signal id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output_signal>
            </output_signals>
            <implementation>
                <assign id="CLK_1">~CLK_1</assign>
            </implementation>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Implement the frequency divider using counters.</description>
        <implementation>
            <assign id="CLK_50">The counter increments on every positive edge of CLK_in or RST. On RST, set CLK_50 to 0. Otherwise, toggle CLK_50.</assign>
            <assign id="CLK_10">The counter increments on every positive edge of CLK_in or RST. On RST, set CLK_10 to 0 and cnt_10 to 0. If cnt_10 is 4, toggle CLK_10 and set cnt_10 to 0. Otherwise, increment cnt_10.</assign>
            <assign id="CLK_1">The counter increments on every positive edge of CLK_in or RST. On RST, set CLK_1 to 0 and cnt_100 to 0. If cnt_100 is 49, toggle CLK_1 and set cnt_100 to 0. Otherwise, increment cnt_100.</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
</module>
